query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS community_impact_metrics (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  metric_date DATE NOT NULL,
  pillar ENUM('LAND', 'AIR', 'WATER', 'SELF', 'ALL') NOT NULL,
  jobs_created INT DEFAULT 0,
  jobs_filled INT DEFAULT 0,
  people_served INT DEFAULT 0,
  w2_to_contractor_transitions INT DEFAULT 0,
  contractor_to_business_transitions INT DEFAULT 0,
  business_to_house_transitions INT DEFAULT 0,
  total_wages_paid DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  grant_funded_positions INT DEFAULT 0,
  revenue_funded_positions INT DEFAULT 0,
  community_reinvestment_amount DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  notes TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

  contractor_to_business_transitions INT DEFAULT 0,
  business_to_house_transitions INT DEFAULT 0,
  total_wages_paid DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  grant_funded_positions INT DEFAULT 0,
  revenue_funded_positions INT DEFAULT 0,
  community_reinvestment_amount DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  notes TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
